channel.title: Track & Tote
channel.description: Short essays, blogs, and notes with transparent public-data method.

item.title: Reading Policy Through Everyday Prices
item.description: Why price changes often feel personal before they become policy headlines.

item.title: What a Good Public-Data Note Looks Like
item.description: A practical checklist for writing data-backed essays without becoming technical for its own sake.

item.title: Why Small Essays Need Method Too
item.description: Even short posts become more powerful when readers can trace the path from observation to claim.
